nodes.name: StackCouplingAuditor
nodes.description: Audit stack coupling across 10 dimensions per element per stack (CF-805). Detect incompatibilities before genesis prompt (CF-799).

nodes.name: HybridGenesisPromptBuilder
nodes.description: Build hybrid genesis prompt from StackCouplingAuditor output (CF-800). Produce 4 mandatory sections (CF-806).

nodes.name: ArchitectureManifestLoader
nodes.description: Load xiigen-architecture-manifest (synthesized from history-bootstrap). Current state of all DNA, BFA, conventions.

nodes.name: StackCompatibilityMatcher
nodes.description: Match requested stack against known stacks and fabric capabilities. Return CouplingTier (IMPL_VARIES, INCOMPATIBLE, STACK_COUPLED).

nodes.name: MultiStackAdaptationPlanner
nodes.description: Plan adaptation strategies for STACK_COUPLED tier (require special handling). Generate adaptation instructions.

nodes.name: StackDeclarationAggregator
nodes.description: Aggregate all stack capability declarations (known + tenant-custom). Emit StackDeclarationsReady.

nodes.name: CompatibilityReadinessGate
nodes.description: Validate all stack compatibility checks and adaptation plans complete. Hard gate: INCOMPATIBLE stacks fail here (CF-799).

nodes.name: OutboxPublisher
nodes.description: Emit CloudEvents to queue fabric after all storage (DNA-8 outbox pattern). Publish StackCompatibilityAssessed.
